dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8530 IH: Quantum for Health Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Sykes introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology

form.official-title: To amend the National Quantum Initiative Act relating to certain health and workforce matters, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Quantum for Health Act.
Subparagraph (A) of section 3(5) of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8802(5)) is amended by inserting , social benefit, after innovation.
Paragraph (1) of section 101(b) of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8811(b)) is amended by inserting in diverse sectors after applications.
Subsection (b) of section 102 of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8812) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking science and technology and inserting science, engineering, and technology research and workforce; and
by inserting , nonprofit research organizations, after universities;

paragraph.text: by amending paragraph (4) to read as follows:
ensure coordination among the collaborative ventures or consortia established under this Act;
in paragraph (7), by inserting nonprofit research organizations, after universities,.

section.text: Subsection (b) of section 103 of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8813) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (8), by striking and after the semicolon;
by redesignating paragraph (9) as paragraph (10); and
by inserting after paragraph (8) the following new paragraph:
the Department of Health and Human Services; and

section.text: Section 104(d)(2) of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8814) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsections (b) and (c), by inserting nonprofit research organizations, before industry each place it appears; and
in subparagraph (G) subsection (d)(2), by inserting educational, environmental, health, after legal,.

section.header: Subcommittee on the economic and security implications of quantum information science
section.text: Subsection (b) of section 105 of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8814a) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (10), by striking and after the semicolon;
by redesignating paragraph (11) as paragraph (12); and
by inserting after paragraph (10) the following new paragraphs:
the Department of Health and Human Services;

section.header: Multidisciplinary centers for quantum research and education
section.text: Section 302 of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8842) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking 5 and inserting 10;

subparagraph.text: in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking basic; and
in paragraph (1), by striking science and engineering and inserting science, engineering, and technology; and
in subparagraph (A), by striking quantum science and inserting quantum information science, engineering, and technology,;
in subparagraph (B), by inserting health, after chemistry,; and

in subparagraph (C), by inserting , including how each participant will develop and implement outreach activities to increase the participation of women and other students from groups historically underrepresented in STEM before the semicolon.
